name: Escalloped Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the bread crumbs, cracker crumbs, butter, salt, and pepper.
2. Place a thin layer of the mixture in a buttered baking dish.
3. Cover with half of the oysters and sprinkle with additional salt and pepper.
4. Add half of the milk or cream and oyster liquor.
5. Repeat steps 1-4 with the remaining ingredients.
6. Sprinkle the top with crumbs, cover the baking dish, and bake at 375 to 425 degrees until done.
